name: 6q25_ARID1B_SF3B5_SD
description: 6q25.3 region containing ARID1B (BAF chromatin-remodelling subunit). ARID1B is paralogous to ARID1A (1p36) at >50% protein identity. Recurrent 6q25.3 microdeletions cause Coffin-Siris syndrome-like phenotypes with ARID1B haploinsufficiency. Short flanking SDs and Alu-rich flanks contribute to non-recurrent breakpoint heterogeneity.

architecture.internal_structure: Short flanking SDs of ~10-30 kb; ARID1B AT-rich-interaction domain shares 60-70% protein identity with ARID1A (1p36); SF3B5 paralog tracts on chr19; Alu-rich introns mediate exonic deletions.
